trace_table.claim: WAI-ME shows up where the industry gathers and brings members into the room. Conferences, workshops, scholarship announcements, and meet-ups, across the region and online. Members attend free. Many events are open to everyone.

trace_table.claim: The story so far, 2013 to 2024.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft), Events / News, The story so far

trace_table.claim: 2013. First participation at the Dubai Airport Show (May), the first board meeting that founded the chapter (October), and the Dubai Airshow (November).
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft), Events / News, Story highlights

trace_table.claim: 2014. Abu Dhabi Air Show, the Global Aviation Aerospace Summit, the WAI International Conference in Florida, and the first MEBAA appearance.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft), Events / News, Story highlights

trace_table.claim: 2015 to 2016. The first annual general assembly at the Dubai Airport Show, the Global Airport Leaders Forum, WETEX, and the IAWA lunch at the Global Aerospace Summit.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft), Events / News, Story highlights

trace_table.claim: 2017 to 2019. The conference grew year on year, reaching the fourth General Assembly in 2019 with more than 750 attendees, 26 international speakers, and 12 sponsors.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft), Events / News, Story highlights

trace_table.claim: 2020 to 2022. The first Biennial Conference in Kuwait, hybrid conferences through the pandemic, and 400-plus attendees at the Abu Dhabi Air Expo in 2022.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft), Events / News, Story highlights

trace_table.claim: 2023 to 2024. The conference at the Airport Show in Dubai, the inaugural Women in Aviation assembly in Riyadh aligned with Saudi Vision 2030, and the 2024 Annual Conference and Awards.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft), Events / News, Story highlights

trace_table.claim: The full archive. Twelve years in the room. 32 events across the region and beyond, from 2013 to 2024. Filter by type, or keep scrolling through the history.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), Page display copy

trace_table.claim: Filter labels All, Conference, Exhibition, Networking, Convention, Meeting; pagination label Show more events; empty state No events in this category yet.

trace_table.claim: Filter counts: All 32, Conference 13, Exhibition 8, Networking 6, Convention 4, Meeting 1.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 32 per-entry Category fields, counted from source

trace_table.claim: MAY 2024 | Conference | Empowering Women in Aviation: Middle East Annual Conference and Awards | Under the esteemed patronage of His Highness Sheikh Ahmed Bin Saeed Al Maktoum, the Women in Aviation Middle East Annual Conference and Awards stood as the region's cornerstone event, known for promoting gender parity in aviation. This empowering gathering connected international leaders, industry pioneers, and future professionals. Co-located with the Airport Show, it celebrated women's achievements and aspirations in the vibrant heart of the UAE's aviation sector.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2024 entry

trace_table.claim: DEC 2023 | Conference | Landmark Event Elevated Women in Saudi Aviation Industry's Future | The inaugural Women in Aviation assembly in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, marked a historic milestone for female empowerment in the aviation sector. Aligned with Vision 2030, this past event reflected the Kingdom's commitment to gender diversity and inclusivity. It provided a platform for networking, experience sharing, and highlighted the expanding support and opportunities for women in the evolving Saudi aviation industry.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2023 entry

trace_table.claim: MAY 2023 | Conference | Elevating Aspirations: WAI-ME Conference Soars at the Airport Show | Igniting inspiration and fostering empowerment, the Women in Aviation Middle East Conference soared to new heights at the prestigious Airport Show. From May 9th to 10th, 2023, aviation enthusiasts gathered at Sheikh Saeed Hall 1, DWTC, Dubai, UAE. Uniting industry leaders, this groundbreaking event celebrated women's achievements and paved the way for a more inclusive future in aviation.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2023 entry

trace_table.claim: NOV 2022 | Conference | Center Stage at Abu Dhabi Air Expo | During Abu Dhabi Air Expo 2022, with the patronage of His Excellency Mohamed AlSalami - the Chairman of the Department of Civil Aviation Government of Fujairah and Deputy Chairman of the General Civil Aviation Authority, we had the pleasure of launching the conference program on Tuesday 1st of November with an exciting agenda, extraordinary speakers, and over 400 attendees.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2022 entry

trace_table.claim: MAY 2022 | Conference | Annual Conference - Dubai Airport Show | As part of our annual conference, we celebrated the achievements of women in aviation once again, under the patronage of His Highness Sheikh Ahmed Bin Saeed Al Maktoum, President of Dubai Civil Aviation Authority, Chairman of Dubai Airports, and Chairman and Chief Executive of Emirates Airline and Group.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2022 entry

trace_table.claim: NOV 2021 | Exhibition | Dubai Airshow | As part of the biennial Dubai Airshow, we had the opportunity to interact with a wide range of industry professionals, including engineers, military personnel, and maintenance personnel. This allowed us to continue to raise awareness of the importance of women in aviation by participating in the event.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2021 entry

trace_table.claim: MAY 2021 | Conference | Annual Conference - Dubai Airport Show | Under the patronage of Sheikh Ahmed Bin Saeed Al Maktoum, President of Dubai Civil Aviation Authority, Chairman of Dubai Airports, and Chairman and Chief Executive of Emirates Airline and Group; we held this year's annual conference as a hybrid event both on-site at the Dubai Airport Show and via online participation of keynote speakers.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2021 entry

trace_table.claim: JAN 2020 | Conference | First Biennial Conference in Kuwait | Under the patronage of Sheikh Nasser Mohammed Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah and Sheikh Salman Al-Humoud Al-Sabah, President of Directorate General of Civil Aviation of Kuwait and in gratitude to the organizers of Kuwait Aviation Show, our sponsors, our first Biennial Conference in Kuwait event took place - during which we have celebrated the achievement of Kuwaiti women in Aviation.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2020 entry

trace_table.claim: NOV 2019 | Networking | Annual Breakfast | In gratitude to Honeywell, our official sponsor, we held our annual breakfast at the Honeywell exhibition stand.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2019 entry

trace_table.claim: NOV 2019 | Exhibition | Dubai Airshow | Joining the biennial airshow again, our participation brings about exposure to a large variety of different aspects of aviation as we interact with people across engineering, military,and maintenance sectors, amongst many others.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2019 entry

trace_table.claim: SEP 2019 | Networking | Women, Icons of Tolerance | To celebrate Emirati Women's Day, we distributed awards to Emirati women who hold positions in the aviation industry to support their contributions to the country and to the industry at large.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2019 entry

trace_table.claim: MAY 2019 | Conference | Annual Conference | The fourth Women in Aviation - Middle East General Assembly, which took place alongside the Airport Show in Dubai in May, was the biggest congress so far, including more than 750 attendees, 26 international speakers, 12 sponsor companies, and eight media partners.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2019 entry

trace_table.claim: DEC 2018 | Exhibition | MEBAA | Our team and members united in the Middle East & North Africa Business Aviation Association (MEBAA), the official representative of the business aviation industry in the Middle East and North Africa (MENA).
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2018 entry

trace_table.claim: MAY 2018 | Conference | Annual Conference | In our largest assembly yet, the event served as a meeting place for international aviation leaders, female industry role models, and hundreds of college and university students looking to join the aviation industry.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2018 entry

trace_table.claim: NOV 2017 | Exhibition | Growing Bigger at Dubai Airshow | We participated in the biennial air show to continue to raise awareness amongst members of the aviation industry.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2017 entry

trace_table.claim: JUL 2017 | Networking | Shaista visits Dubai | Shaist Waiz, first female certified civilian pilot from Afghanistan, and the youngest woman to fly solo around the world in a single-engine aircraft stopped in Dubai to visit us on her journey.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2017 entry

trace_table.claim: MAY 2017 | Conference | Reunited at the Dubai Airport Show | In our second general assembly, members across the Middle East gathered to share their insights and to further investigate challenges that face they and posit solutions on how we can collectively progress towards a better future.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2017 entry

trace_table.claim: OCT 2016 | Conference | Networking at WETEX Show | Under the guidance of HH Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Al Maktoum, we participated in a panel discussion centered on issues related to water conservation, saving natural resources, and building a sustainable environment.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2016 entry

trace_table.claim: MAY 2016 | Conference | Dubai Airport Show Debut | Our first annual assembly, held alongside the annual Dubai Airport show, allowed us to re-align our goals through the feedback we got through speaking with attendees in the show and further customize our platform to meet the needs of women in the local aviation scene.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2016 entry

trace_table.claim: MAR 2016 | Networking | AUH Aerospace Summit | In collaboration with IAWA, our members were invited to an exclusive lunch meeting during the Global Aerospace Summit in Abu Dhabi.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2016 entry

trace_table.claim: NOV 2015 | Exhibition | Dubai Airshow 2015 - Round II | It was an honour for us to participate again in Dubai Airshow - thanks for the show organizers for sponsoring our stand.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2015 entry

trace_table.claim: MAY 2015 | Convention | Global Airport Leaders Forum | Another great chance to raise awareness on what WAI-ME has to offer to our community and the region as a whole!
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2015 entry

trace_table.claim: MAR 2015 | Conference | Building Bridges in Dallas, Texas | We participated in the Annual International Women in Aviation Conference in Dallas, Texas. In this conference, we met and built bridges with other Women in Aviation members from across the world.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2015 entry

trace_table.claim: MAR 2015 | Networking | Gala Dinner Celebrating Woman Day | Dubai Ladies Club hosted our first annual gala dinner in celebration our Woman Day.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2015 entry

trace_table.claim: JAN 2015 | Networking | Board Meeting at Bin Lahej Gallery | Recently we held an important board meeting at the exclusive studio of renowned Emirati Artist, Mattar Bin Lahej.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2015 entry

trace_table.claim: DEC 2014 | Exhibition | Soaring high at MEBAA 2014 | This years event was also the first ever edition of MEBAA where Women in Aviation International had taken part as an exhibitor.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2014 entry

trace_table.claim: APR 2014 | Convention | Making an impact at the Global Aviation Summit | Representatives of Women in Aviation delivered impressive presentations on the focus of the chapter during the Global Aviation Aerospace Summit.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2014 entry

trace_table.claim: MAR 2014 | Convention | Annual International WAI Conference | We attended the 2014 Annual International WAI Conference held in Disney's Coronado Springs Resort Lake Buena Vista, Florida, USA. And it's been a blast!
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2014 entry

trace_table.claim: MAR 2014 | Exhibition | Participating at Abu Dhabi Air Show | In case you missed it, we were at the Abu Dhabi Air show - an exclusive business aviation event that brings together local and international airlines.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2014 entry

trace_table.claim: NOV 2013 | Exhibition | Connecting at the Dubai Air Show | The Dubai Airshow is the largest air-show event in the region - and we were there front and center.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2013 entry

trace_table.claim: OCT 2013 | Meeting | First Board Meeting | As a small group, we united in establishing a Middle East chapter for Women in Aviation to spread our commitment and passion to women around us. We sought to spread the spark we felt towards our beloved sky.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2013 entry

trace_table.claim: MAY 2013 | Convention | Taking action with Dubai Airport Show | With great honour, we participated in Dubai Airport Show under the patronage of H.H. Sheikh Ahmad bin Saeed Al Maktoum.
trace_table.vault_source: 04 Events/04 Events Archive - Public Listing (Reference), 2013 entry

trace_table.claim: More dates are coming. Join WAI-ME and you will be the first to hear.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft), Events / News, Empty-state line
